description: A tabbed navigation bar with accessible ARIA roles, used for switching between year or module panels on course pages.

props.name: tabs
props.type: Array<{ id: string; label: string; selected?: boolean; tabIndex?: number }>

stories.name: Default
stories.description: Three-tab navigation for undergraduate course years

stories.name: FourYears
stories.description: Four-tab navigation for a four-year MEng course

stories.name: PostgraduateModules
stories.description: Three-tab navigation for a postgraduate course with module pathways

tabs.label: Stem Cell and Regenerative Medicine pathway
Cell Biology and Drug Development pathway

stories.name: SingleTab
stories.description: Single-tab navigation where only one panel of content exists

notes: The .uos-tabs selector itself returns 0 pages in the DOM index; the observable root element is .tab-gradient which wraps the tablist. The tabpanels (div.yearpanel[role=tabpanel]) are siblings to .tab-gradient inside the .uos-tabs wrapper and contain freeform CMS content — they are not modelled here. Non-selected buttons have tabindex='-1' per ARIA tab pattern. The aria-label on the tablist varies ('Years' for most pages) but is included as a prop for flexibility.
